name: LISATA THERAPEUTICS, INC.
business: Lisata Therapeutics is a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company dedicated to the discovery, development, and commercialization of innovative therapies for the treatment of solid tumors and other serious diseases.
sellsTo: patients with cholangiocarcinoma, appendiceal cancer, colon cancer, glioblastoma multiforme

exposures.sentence: Our investigational product, certepetide (formerly known as LSTA1 or CEND-1), is designed to activate a novel uptake pathway (the C-end rule active transport mechanism) that allows co-administered or tethered (i.e., molecularly bound) anti-cancer drugs to target and penetrate solid tumors more effectively.

catalysts.event: Preliminary data from Cohort A of ASCEND trial reported at ASCO GI meeting
catalysts.sentence: The preliminary data from Cohort A were reported at the ASCO GI meeting on January 24, 2025, demonstrating a median overall survival (mOS) of 12.68 months for the certepetide treated group, compared to 9.72 months for the placebo treated group.

catalysts.event: Preliminary data from Cohort B of ASCEND trial presented at ESMO-GI meeting
catalysts.sentence: The preliminary data from Cohort B were presented at the ESMO-GI meeting in July 2025, demonstrating a six-month progression-free survival (6MPFS) of 60.8% for the certepetide-treated group, whereas the 6MPFS in the placebo-treated group was 25%.

catalysts.event: Additional data from Cohorts A and B presented at ESMO annual meeting
catalysts.sentence: Additional data from Cohorts A and B was presented at the ESMO annual meeting in October 2025 with a final study report of the ASCEND study anticipated to be prepared and made available to Lisata in 2026.

catalysts.event: Final study report of ASCEND study expected
catalysts.sentence: final study report of the ASCEND study anticipated to be prepared and made available to Lisata in 2026.

catalysts.event: Proposed acquisition by Kuva Labs Inc.
catalysts.sentence: The Offer and Merger are expected to close in the second quarter of 2026, subject to the terms of the Merger Agreement.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. annual new cases of pancreatic cancer: approximately 67,000
tamClaims.sentence: In the United States, there are approximately 67,000 new cases of pancreatic cancer diagnosed annually.

tamClaims.claim: Outside U.S. annual pancreatic cancer diagnoses: additional 498,000
tamClaims.sentence: Outside of the United States, there are an additional 498,000 annual pancreatic cancer diagnoses.
PDAC accounts for more than 80% of all pancreatic cancer cases, so worldwide, nearly 452,000 annual incidences of PDAC are diagnosed.

tamClaims.claim: Annual U.S. deaths from pancreatic cancer: approximately 52,000
tamClaims.sentence: Further, PDAC is one of the most aggressive and lethal malignancies, with a 5-year survival rate of 13%, resulting in approximately 52,000 deaths annually in the United States alone.

tamClaims.claim: Global annual deaths from pancreatic cancer: over 466,000
tamClaims.sentence: Moreover, on a global scale, pancreatic cancer results in over 466,000 deaths per year.
